mapper.sql: id, from_user_id, to_user_id, content, status, create_time, read_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO private_message (from_user_id, to_user_id, content, status, create_time) VALUES (#{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{content}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM private_message WHERE (from_user_id = #{userId1} AND to_user_id = #{userId2}) OR (from_user_id = #{userId2} AND to_user_id = #{userId1}) ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT FROM private_message WHERE to_user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM private_message WHERE to_user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE private_message SET status = 1, read_time = NOW() WHERE to_user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
